---
title: "Unit 4 - Data Wrangling"
---

> During this section, we will highlight the utility of the dplyr package and further dive into the tidyverse. For this lecture, have the datasets downloaded and put in the appropriate place in your files

This is currently situated as a document which you can find below:

## [Link to Document](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Uykf4aAqjMXEB84JGPO4XOOYYfuqHxA0CTx2uzf5SiQ/edit?usp=sharing){target="_blank"}

The instructor is working to put these into some beautiful slides :)
